Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Courtney Emery.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:50 a.m., adjourning at 10:51 a.m. and reconvening at 10:52 a.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Associate Vendor Management Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Jacobs and Ms. Echeverria-Licona appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Courtney Emery.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book, Account Stated and Money Lent) was filed on September 27, 2021, and personally served on defendant Courtney Emery on December 19, 2021.
Default as to defendant Courtney Emery was entered on February 28, 2022.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Account Application........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Cardholder Agreement.......................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Billing Statements.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Courtney Emery, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,334.08.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $31,334.08.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:02.
